papers.title: Coronary vessel detection methods for organ‐mounted robots
papers.venue: The international journal of medical robotics + computer assisted surgery : MRCAS
papers.abstract: HeartLander is a tethered robot walker that utilizes suction to adhere to the beating heart. HeartLander can be used for minimally invasive administration of cardiac medications or ablation of tissue. In order to administer injections safely, HeartLander must avoid coronary vasculature.

papers.abstract: The juiciest mysteries of authorship are those which present unusual challenges. These mysteries stretch the capacities of scholars of attribution and, eventually, drive methodological innovation. ...
